summary: Health Monitor dashboard — connector status overview for admins
description_md:
As a workspace-admin, I want to see a unified Health Monitor dashboard showing the real-time status of all connectors in my tenant, so that I can quickly identify failed or degraded data source connections and take corrective action before they impact downstream compliance reporting.

**Background**:
The Connector Health Monitor (F-A3) provides visibility into the operational state of all configured connectors across the workspace. Admins currently must check each connector individually through separate logs, which is time-consuming and error-prone. This dashboard consolidates status indicators, last sync timestamps, and error messages into a single view.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
1. Dashboard displays a table listing all connectors (Salesforce, SAP S/4) with columns for Name, Status (Green/Yellow/Red), Last Sync Time, and Error Count.
2. Clicking on a connector row navigates to a detailed view showing the last 100 audit log entries for that specific data source.
3. Status colors are automatically calculated: Green = successful sync in last 1 hour, Yellow = warning state or sync 1-6 hours ago, Red = failed sync or no activity in last 6 hours.
4. Workspace-admin role can filter the table by Status and search by connector name; filtering persists across page reloads.

comments.author: dev2@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Implemented the status calculation logic based on last sync timestamps. The color thresholds (1h/6h) are configurable via workspace settings for different tenant requirements.

comments.author: qa1@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Verified all 4 acceptance criteria. The audit log export from the detail view correctly shows PII-tagged fields masked for non-compliance-officer users. Ready for release.
